title: oSzoukaua's: Visible importance
description: Visible importance! makes certain important and/or technically useful blocks distinctly unique and visible with a hazard outline!
body:
# Description: This is a **Resource** pack that makes certain blocks of *technical importance* and *common desire* a lot more visibly distinct by adding a "**Greenyellow**" and Black hazard style **outline** around them, preserving *most* of their original vanilla texture
Current outlined blocks >- *Suspicious Gravel* - ![suspicious_gravel_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/suspicious_gravel_3.png "suspicious_gravel_preview") > >- *Suspicious Sand* - ![suspicious_sand_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/suspicious_sand_3.png "suspicious_sand_preview") > >- *Infested Stone* - ![infested_stone_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/infested_stone.png "infested_stone_preview") > >- *Infested Stone Bricks* - ![infested_stone_bricks_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/infested_stone_bricks.png "infested_stone_bricks_preview") > >- *Infested Cracked Stone Bricks* - ![infested_cracked_stone_bricks_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/infested_cracked_stone_bricks.png "infested_cracked_stone_bricks_preview") > >- *Infested Mossy Stone Bricks* - ![infested_mossy_stone_bricks_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/infested_mossy_stone_bricks.png "infested_mossy_stone_bricks_preview") > >- *Infested Chiselled Stone Bricks* - ![infested_chiseled_stone_bricks_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/infested_chiseled_stone_bricks.png "infested_chiseled_stone_bricks_preview") > >- *Infested Cobblestone* - ![infested_cobblestone_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/infested_cobblestone.png "infested_cobblestone_preview") > >- *Infested Deepslate* - ![infested_deepslate_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/infested_deepslate_top.png "infested_deepslate_preview") > >- *Diamond Ore* - ![diamond_ore_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/diamond_ore.png "diamond_ore_preview") > >- *Deepslate Diamond Ore* - ![deepslate_diamond_ore_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/deepslate_diamond_ore.png "deepslate_diamond_ore_preview") > >- *Sculk Sensor* - ![sculk_sensor_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/sculk_sensor.png "sculk_sensor_preview") > >- *Naturally Spawning Sculk Shrieker* - ![sculk_shrieker_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/sculk_shrieker.png "sculk_shrieker_preview") > >- *Trapped Chest* - ![trapped_chest_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/chest_outline.png "trapped_chest_preview") > >- *Ancient Debris* - ![ancient_debris_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/ancient_debris_side.png "ancient_debris_preview") > >- *Wither Rose* - ![wither_rose_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/wither_rose_side_visibility_outline.png "wither_rose_preview") > >- *Powdered Snow* - ![powdered_snow_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/powder_snow.png "powdered_snow_preview") > >- *Gilded Blackstone* - ![gilded_blackstone_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/gilded_blackstone.png "gilded_blackstone_preview") > >- *Budding Amethyst* - ![budding_amethyst_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/budding_amethyst.png "budding_amethyst_preview") > >- *Mob Spawner* - ![mob_spawner_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/spawner.png "mob_spawner_preview") > >- *Trial Spawner* - ![trial_spawner_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/trial_spawner_side_active.png "trial_spawner_preview") > >- *Ominous Trial Spawner* - ![ominous_trial_spawner_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/trial_spawner_side_active_ominous.png "ominous_trial_spawner_preview") > >- *Trial Vault* - ![trial_vault_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/vault_front_on.png "trial_vault_preview") > >- *Ominous Trial Vault* - ![ominous_trial_vault_preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oSzoukaua/visible-importance/main/block_preview_icons/vault_front_on_ominous.png "ominous_trial_vault_preview")



## Notes:
Client-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed on the Client
